sections.paragraph:
pl. אֵילִים m., prop. strong, robust.

(1) p1. mighty ones, leaders, nobles of a state, Exo 15:15 Eze 17:13 2Ki 24:15 (in קרי). See אוּל No. 2, 3 .

(2) a strong, robust tree, like δρῦς, specially, the oak or terebinth; sometimes the palm, i.q. אֵלָה, אֵלֹון which is more in use. Sing. occurs once, Gen 14:6, in the pr.n. אֵיל פָּארָן; LXX. τερέβινθος τῆς Φαράν Pl. אֵילִים, אֵלִים Isa 1:29 57:5 61:3 .
